summary: 文章称，at 32K context, MiMo-V2-Flash has KV throughput of only 4.66Gbps, which is 13 times lower than MiniMax-M2.5. 文章称，at 32K context, Qwen3.5-397B has KV throughput of 8.25Gbps versus 33.35Gbps for a comparable dense model, a 4x reduction. 文章称，in tests on an internal 1T-parameter hybrid-attention model, the PrFaaS-PD architecture increased service throughput by 54% compared with a homogeneous PD cluster of the same hardware scale.
main_points: 文章称，at 32K context, MiMo-V2-Flash has KV throughput of only 4.66Gbps, which is 13 times lower than MiniMax-M2.5.
文章称，at 32K context, Qwen3.5-397B has KV throughput of 8.25Gbps versus 33.35Gbps for a comparable dense model, a 4x reduction.
文章称，in tests on an internal 1T-parameter hybrid-attention model, the PrFaaS-PD architecture increased service throughput by 54% compared with a homogeneous PD cluster of the same hardware scale.
文章称，in the same experiments, the PrFaaS-PD architecture reduced P90 TTFT by 64%.

文章称，the PrFaaS cluster's average egress bandwidth was only 13Gbps on a 100Gbps cross-cluster link, and that ordinary commercial Ethernet could stably support KV Cache transfer without RDMA in this setup.
文章称，the team proposed Prefill-as-a-Service (PrFaaS), a cross-data-center large-model inference service architecture.
文章称，PrFaaS enables KV Cache transmission across data centers and completely decouples Prefill and Decode onto different heterogeneous clusters.

文章称，in a hybrid architecture combining linear attention and full attention, linear layers produce fixed-size recurrent states that do not grow with context length, while only full-attention layers generate length-dependent KV Cache.

claims.text: 文章称，the team proposed Prefill-as-a-Service (PrFaaS), a cross-data-center large-model inference service architecture.
文章称，PrFaaS enables KV Cache transmission across data centers and completely decouples Prefill and Decode onto different heterogeneous clusters.

文章称，in a hybrid architecture combining linear attention and full attention, linear layers produce fixed-size recurrent states that do not grow with context length, while only full-attention layers generate length-dependent KV Cache.
文章称，at 32K context, MiMo-V2-Flash has KV throughput of only 4.66Gbps, which is 13 times lower than MiniMax-M2.5.
文章称，at 32K context, Qwen3.5-397B has KV throughput of 8.25Gbps versus 33.35Gbps for a comparable dense model, a 4x reduction.
文章称，in tests on an internal 1T-parameter hybrid-attention model, the PrFaaS-PD architecture increased service throughput by 54% compared with a homogeneous PD cluster of the same hardware scale.
文章称，in the same experiments, the PrFaaS-PD architecture reduced P90 TTFT by 64%.

文章称，the PrFaaS cluster's average egress bandwidth was only 13Gbps on a 100Gbps cross-cluster link, and that ordinary commercial Ethernet could stably support KV Cache transfer without RDMA in this setup.
